sessions.intent: Design the branch-wide invariant: every Context? and Actor? becomes non-null, with one Data read path.

before.assumptions: The coder's seed plan (.bot/context-never-null/coder/plan.md) scoped this to the serializer/Wire read path. Ingi widened it: the goal is to remove Context?/Actor? everywhere, not only in the serializer.
before.risk: Treating it as a serializer-only rename misses the real surface (16 nullable fields + 56 downstream params). The value-type context layer and Step.Context are the parts with genuine design decisions, not mechanical flips.

actions.context: Traced the full nullable surface: 13 Context fields + 3 Actor fields + 56 downstream params. Verified the Wire fork (_context gates at 386/406/419 and the trust branch 211-227), the self-contained Ed25519 verify (signature embeds its own public key), the ContextLessFallback 5 sites, and that Step.Context's only consumer is Step.Disabled whose every caller already holds the context.

Plan spine plus topic deep-dives (mime-and-verify, value-births, step-context, demolition, after-flow). Captures the MIME-decides-verify model, value-born-through-context (context.Null/Error/Ok, no System-context floor), the construction-order flips, Step.Context deletion, the demolition worklist, the OBP self-audit, and the stays-nullable list.

Six stage files for the coder, ordered by dependency: (1) construction-order non-null + GetActor throws, (2) delete Step.Context, (3) values born through context, (4) serializer/store binds context + one read path, (5) authenticity + verify.Root + bootstrap, (6) invariant proof (tripwire, fixture sweep, acceptance). Each carries a 'you own this' callout.

after.status: Plan written and settled through conversation with Ingi; six stage files carved at the architect root. Ready for test-designer and coder.
after.notes: Decisions folded in across the session: MIME decides verify (application/plang signs+verifies); authenticity added via navigation (verify reads its own Context.Actor.Identity), not a decomposed param; verify.Root flag for the bootstrap root read, keypair self-consistency in the identity provider; GetActor throws; Step.Context deleted (Disabled context-parameterized); actor.Identity (not PublicKey); %MyIdentity% -> %Identity%; settings is system-owned (App.System.Context). OBP self-audit run (Rules #2/#3/#4) — fixed a decomposed param and verb+noun names. Caveat: verify-on-read is integrity + signer-authenticity, but the private key is plaintext in sqlite, so key-at-rest encryption is later hardening; hash canonicalization must use a body-only write.
